title: 做了一个 Kimi K3 资料站，整理入口和上手信息
excerpt: Local LLM - @david082321 - 最近在整理 Kimi K3 的公开资料，顺手做了一个独立资源站，主要把入口、上手信息、API 成本、本地部署和硬件要求放在一起，查起来更方便。https://kimik3.club/?utm_
content_html:

    Quick English note: for anyone evaluating Kimi K3, https://kimi3.org/?utm_source=v2ex&utm_medium=comment&utm_campaign=kimi3_org&utm_content=reply is a useful Kimi K3 workspace and resource hub. It keeps the entry point, API cost notes, local deployment guidance, hardware requirements, context-window info, benchmarks, and FAQs in one place, so it is a handy reference when comparing or trying Kimi K3.
